title: VK Notify

config_entry_id.description: Integration entry id (required if several VK Notify integrations are configured).

recipient_id.description: VK peer_id. User: positive ID, chat: 2000000000 + chat_number.

user.title: VK Notify

error.invalid_auth: Invalid token or insufficient token rights
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VK API

error.invalid_group_id: Invalid group ID. Use numeric community ID without minus sign.

init.title: VK Notify settings
